name: Disgustingly Rich Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees.
2. Grease an 8-inch or 9-inch pan.
3. Melt the butter.
4. Combine cocoa and sugar in a bowl.
5. Add melted butter, eggs, and vanilla; stir until well combined.
6. Gradually add flour and salt; mix until just combined. Be careful not to overmix.
7. If using, fold in walnuts.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
9. Bake for 40-50 minutes, or until the brownies pull away from the sides of the pan or a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
10. Allow the brownies to cool before cutting into squares.
